name: EDWBDFPHomeBcbsaMvpsCtlUpdt

text.value: WITH cte_agg AS (SELECT BDF_CMPL_DT_SK, MIN(CYC_2A_ID) AS CYC_2A_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.P_HOME_BCBSA_MVPS_CTL WHERE BDF_CMPL_DT_SK = '1753-01-01' AND CYC_2A_ENR_CMPL_DT_SK <> '1753-01-01' AND CYC_2D_ATTRBTN_CMPL_DT_SK <> '1753-01-01' GROUP BY BDF_CMPL_DT_SK) INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.P_HOME_BCBSA_MVPS_CTL (CYC_2A_ID, BDF_CMPL_DT_SK) SELECT cte_agg.CYC_2A_ID, '@{pipeline().parameters.EdwRunCycleDate}' AS BDF_CMPL_DT_SK FROM cte_agg
